seoTitle: Oberon vs Ocean Shores — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oberon and Ocean Shores. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oberon vs Ocean Shores: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oberon and Ocean Shores.
heading: Oberon vs Ocean Shores — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oberon, New South Wales and Ocean Shores, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oberon has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Ocean Shores (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oberon or Ocean Shores safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oberon has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Ocean Shores scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oberon scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean Shores scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oberon or Ocean Shores?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oberon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
